Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 33

ARCH400 Architecture Design Studio | (6 Credits)

Introduction to architectural design with particular emphasis

on conventions and principles of architecture, visual and verbal communication skills, formal analysis, design process, spatial composition, architectural promenade, basic program distribution, and elementary constructional and environmental responses.

Restriction: Must be in a major in ARCH-Architecture Program; and permission of ARCH-Architecture Program.
